title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Qualcomm India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
